titleStmt.title: SII 29.183: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 183. (A.R. No. B. 209 of 1962-63.) ŚANGAMĒŚVARAM [NEAR KŪDAVALLI VILLAGE], ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Basement slab to the right of the Nandi maṇṭapa of Sangamēśvara temple.

It registers a grant of one baḷḷa (measurement) oil each for burning four perpetual lamps before the god Sankēśvara by Rāja-Gurudēva heggaḍe Jōgabhaṭṭa who was governing Kūḍala-12 division. Ballavarasa is mentioned at the end.
It is dated Śaka 967, Tāraṇa. the cyclic year Tāraṇa occurred in Śaka 966 corresponding to 1044 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Published in Telañgāṇa Śāsanamulu Vol. II, p. 170, No. 13.
div.p:
sakavariṣa 967 tāraṇa saṁvatsarada śrāhiyoḷ śrīmat rāja
gurudēva heggaḍe jōgabhaṭṭar kūḍalapanneraḍuvanāḷataviḷdu
saṁkēśvara dēvarige nāluku naṁdādīvigege diḷpaloṁdu baḷḷa
Eṇneya naḍasuvudu Idanāvanōrvva stānavanāḷvavaṁ
naḍasuvudu naḍasadava bāṇārāsivuṁ kavilenaḷidar
śrīballavarasarāṇe .
Digital edition of SII 29.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
